title: berkheya griquana
intro: Berkheya griquana, also known as the Cape daisy, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Berkheya griquana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems, among others. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to make remedies for various ailments.
